title: Eriochloa globosa

taxonomy: Eriochloa globosa is classified within the family Poaceae, commonly known as grasses, and is further divided into the subfamily Chloridoideae. This classification places it within the tribe Cynodonteae, a group of grasses that are native to various parts of the world. The genus Eriochloa is a distinct group within the Poaceae family, characterized by its unique growth habits and leaf structures. Eriochloa globosa, specifically, is a species of grass that is known to thrive in tropical and subtropical regions. Its classification reflects its close relationships with other species within the Cynodonteae tribe.
